title: vangueria apiculata
intro: Vangueria apiculata, also known as the "Red Milkwood" or "Butter Tree", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections, due to its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. In traditional herbal medicine, Vangueria apiculata is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to leverage its health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving digestive issues.
